tags.expression:
CASE({[.]UPS_Output_Source_Raw},
    0,  "Reserved",
    1,  "Normal Operation",
    2,  "Battery Operation",
    3,  "Battery Test",
    4,  "Requested Static Bypass",
    5,  "Forced Static Bypass",
    6,  "Maintenance Bypass",
    7,  "Off",
    8,  "Emergency Static Bypass",
    9,  "Static Bypass Standby",
    10, "Inverter Standby",
    11, "Power Saving Mode",
    12, "Inverter SPoT Mode",
    13, "ECO Mode",
    14, "ECOnversion",
    "Unknown"
)
tags.name: UPS_Output_Source
